mapper.select: SELECT NOTICE_UUID, WRITE_ID, NOTICE_TITLE, NOTICE_CONTENT, REGISTRY_DATE FROM NOTICE WHERE NOTICE_UUID = #{noticeUuid}
SELECT COUNT(NOTICE_UUID) AS noticeCount FROM NOTICE WHERE 1 = 1

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY REGISTRY_DATE DESC) AS row_num, NOTICE_UUID, WRITE_ID, NOTICE_TITLE, NOTICE_CONTENT, REGISTRY_DATE FROM NOTICE WHERE 1 = 1 ) T WHERE T.row_num > ${offset} AND T.row_num <= (${offset} + ${limitRow})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NOTICE(NOTICE_UUID, WRITE_ID, NOTICE_TITLE, NOTICE_CONTENT) VALUES(#{noticeUuid}, #{writeId}, #{noticeTitle}, #{noticeContent})
